About Scott

Like most pickleball players,
I found it by accident.

I've played sport my whole life, but when I found pickleball, I had zero racket sport background. When I decided I wanted to take the sport a little more seriously and actually improve, I did what most people would do and went online to search for coaches near me. But there was nobody local, no clear pathway, and no obvious place to start.

That is why I am here today. I wanted to fill that gap in Wales and become the help and support that simply was not available to me when I was starting out. Completely self-taught, with no coaching, I went from picking up a paddle for the first time to becoming a Welsh National Triple Crown Champion and captain of the Welsh National Team at the European Pickleball Championships (2025) in just two years.

Everything I share comes from real experience, the mistakes, the trial and error, and the hours spent on court figuring things out the hard way so you don't have to. It is not just about technique either. The mental side of the game plays a huge role, from decision making and confidence to handling pressure and staying composed when it matters most.

Long term, I know I will not always be on court. At some point the knees will have their say. But when that time comes, I still want to be involved, helping guide Wales, developing players, and pushing the sport forward. Maybe even being part of the journey that takes pickleball all the way to the Olympics.

So if you want to learn from someone who has figured it out the hard way and reached the top, book a session and let's improve your game together.

Career Highlights & Experience

🏆 Welsh Nationals Triple Crown Champion (2025)
🌍 Welsh Squad, European Championships (2024) & (2025)
🥇 Multiple medalist at the Welsh Open (2025)
⚡ PPL Challenger, Pickleball Premier League (3rd)
🥇 Multiple gold medallist in 4.5+ categories, UK & abroad
📋 Level 1 Qualified Pickleball Coach

Where I'm Based

South Wales, and happy to travel.

Whether you come to me or I come to you, the goal is always the same: clear guidance, purposeful practice, and an environment where you enjoy getting better.

📍

Graig Community Centre, Bassaleg

My regular residency. I run sessions here every Monday from 17:00–19:00. It's a great single-court space with plenty of room for repetition and uninterrupted hitting. Sessions can be 1-to-1, small group, or extended drilling.

I also have access to a ball machine here, ideal for working on specific shots and patterns.

Ball machine available
🚗

South Wales & Beyond

I regularly run sessions across South Wales and am always happy to travel to you. This could be your local club night, sports centre, or anywhere with a court available. Wherever we train, I will adapt the session to suit the space and the group. If you are not sure what would work best, just ask.

Mobile coaching available
Upcoming Events

One-off sessions & masterclasses.

Alongside regular coaching, I occasionally run focused one-off events for all levels. Keep an eye out here, or message me directly to be added to a list so you hear about them first.

What people say

Don't take my word for it.

Real feedback from real players. I promise I didn't bribe them or offer discounted sessions in return.

Absolutely loved the session. Scott is a clear and articulate communicator, coaching points were well explained without being overwhelming. Making things competitive at times increased the drive, and it was genuinely fun. His proven experience adds real weight to what he says.

Mark
Cardiff Pickleball Club

Scott was a joy to work with. A two-hour session at our club went exceptionally well, varied drills, one-to-one advice, and so much learned in a short space of time. Such was the success that we immediately booked him again. Can't wait to try out my new forehand drive!

Paula
Gower Pickleball Club

Scott identified exactly where my technique needed adjusting, put me at ease throughout, and drilled the methods until I was hitting them consistently. After the session, he even sent a written summary of what we'd worked on. A really worthwhile experience.

Helen
Torfaen Pickleball Club

Great fun drills, approachable manner, and genuinely useful insights into court positioning. It was also inspiring to see someone with no racket background excel the way Scott has, his advice felt personal and relevant. Would definitely have more sessions.

Kim
Gower Pickleball Club

Best club coaching session I've attended, and this was my third. Drills were clearly communicated, and I picked up several things I hadn't considered before, including when to speed up in a dinking rally. Really positive experience.

Claire
Cardiff Pickleball Club

Excellent coaching, great structure, interesting insights, and delivered in an easy, flexible manner. Good value for money and I came away with real things to work on.

Sam
Cardiff Pickleball Club

Well organised, clearly demonstrated, and genuinely useful tips on how the game should be played. Thoroughly enjoyed it.

Caroline
Gower Pickleball Club

I enjoyed the session and took away some real pointers to work on. Scott has great knowledge and a coaching style that actually makes things stick. Good value for money.

John
Cardiff Pickleball Club

I was genuinely impressed. Great delivery, clear explanations, and I learned things from Scott's input that I hadn't encountered before. A real asset to pickleball in Wales.

Jason
Cardiff Pickleball Club
